data.name: ABusinessObjectiveAlignmentIsRequired
data.value: A Business Objective Alignment is Required

data.name: ACommentCanOnlyBeAddedToAValidProject
data.value: A comment can only be added to a valid project.

data.name: AFacilitatorEmailAddressIsRequired
data.value: A Facilitator Email Address is Required

data.name: AGoodProblemStatementShouldContainWhatWhereWhenAndImpactToTheBusiness
data.value: A good problem statement should contain - what, where, when and impact to the business.

data.name: AGoodTitleShouldBeShortAndContainSearchableWords
data.value: A good title should be short and contain searchable words

data.name: AnErrorOccurredWhileCreatingTheCIProject
data.value: An error occurred while creating the CI Project

data.name: AnErrorOccurredWhileUpdatingTheCIProject
data.value: An error occurred while updating the CI Project

data.name: AnExecutiveSponsorEmailAddressIsRequired
data.value: An Executive Sponsor Email Address is Required

data.name: AnOwnerEmailAddressIsRequired
data.value: An Owner Email Address is Required

data.name: ASponsorEmailAddressIsRequired
data.value: A Sponsor Email Address is Required

data.name: ASupportingValueStreamIsRequired
data.value: A Supporting Value Stream is Required

data.name: ATeamMemberCanOnlyBeAddedToAValidProject
data.value: A team member can only be added to a valid project.

data.name: AValidEmailAddressIsRequired
data.value: A valid Email Address is Required

data.name: AWideSelectionOfTemplatesAndPowerfulToolsAtYourFingertips
data.value: A wide selection of templates and powerful tools at your fingertips.

data.name: AcceptToReceiveEmailSentToMultipleRecipients
data.value: Accept to receive email sent to multiple recipients

data.name: AcceptToReceivePostOrPageNotificationEmails
data.value: Accept to receive post or page notification emails

data.name: ActionActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Action: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: AlignStrategyWithExecutionMeasureProgressInRealTimeAndEnsureEveryInitiativeDrivesOrganizationalGoalsForward
data.value: Align strategy with execution, measure progress in real time, and ensure every initiative drives organizational goals forward.

data.name: AllContinuousImprovementInitiativesAlongsideTheirObjectivesAndStatuses
data.value: All Continuous Improvement initiatives alongside their objectives and statuses.

data.name: AllInitiativesAlongsideTheirObjectivesAndStatuses
data.value: All initiatives alongside their objectives and statuses.

data.name: AllMyInitiativesAlongsideTheirObjectivesAndStatuses
data.value: All my initiatives alongside their objectives and statuses.

data.name: AllMyStrategicInitiativesAlongsideTheirStatuses
data.value: All my Strategic initiatives alongside their statuses.

data.name: AllOperationalExcellenceInitiativesAlongsideTheirObjectivesAndStatuses
data.value: All Operational Excellence initiatives alongside their objectives and statuses.

data.name: AnalyseFinancialPerformanceWithDetailedReportingOnHardAndSoftSavingsROIAndProjectOutcomesExportDataConnectPowerBIAndGenerateManagementReadyDashboards
data.value: Analyse financial performance with detailed reporting on hard and soft savings, ROI and project outcomes. Export data, connect Power BI and generate management-ready dashboards.

data.name: AssociateEveryInitiativeWithCorporateStrategyToDriveValueCreationAndPLImpact
data.value: Associate every initiative with corporate strategy to drive value creation and P & L Impact.

data.name: AtLeastOneBusinessObjectiveAlignmentIsRequired
data.value: At least one Business Objective Alignment is required.

data.name: AtLeastOneCommentIsRequired
data.value: At least one comment is required

data.name: AtLeastOneOfHardOrSoftSavingMustContainAValue
data.value: At least one of Hard or Soft saving must contain a value.

data.name: AtLeastOneTeamMemberIsRequired
data.value: At least one team member is required

data.name: AtLeastOneToolIsRequired
data.value: At least one tool is required

data.name: AuditProjectResultsValidateBenefitsAndMaintainFinancialGovernance
data.value: Audit project results, validate benefits, and maintain financial governance.

data.name: BringYourContinuousImprovementIntoOnePlace
data.value: Bring your continuous improvement into one place

data.name: BuildACultureOfContinuousImprovementWhereEveryTeamMemberIsEmpoweredToContributeIdeasAndTakeOwnership
data.value: Build a culture of continuous improvement where every team member is empowered to contribute ideas and take ownership. Foster engagement, accountability, and collaboration to ensure improvements are sustained and scaled organization-wide.

data.name: CarryOverProjectActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Carry Over Project?: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CertificationMustBeOneOfDMAICGembaKaizenJDIProjectOthers
data.value: Certification must be one of: 'DMAIC', 'Gemba Kaizen', 'JDI', 'Project', 'Others'

data.name: CertificationMustBeOneOfGreenBeltBlackBeltPMPNotApplicable
data.value: Certification must be one of: Green Belt', 'Black Belt', 'PMP', Not Applicable

data.name: CertificationActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Certification: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CheckTheBoxForAnyTeamMemberYouWouldLikeToReceiveAnEmailNotificationWheneverAnyUpdateIsMade
data.value: Check the box for any team member you would like to receive an email notification whenever any update is made

data.name: CITrackerHelpsTeamsCaptureIdeasAuditProcessesAndMeasureFinancialBenefitsWithDocumentsStoredInYourTenantViaSharePointIntegration
data.value: CI Tracker helps teams capture ideas, audit processes, and measure financial benefits — with documents stored in your tenant via SharePoint integration.

data.name: CITrackerStrivesToBridgeTheGapBetweenDataAndActionEmpoweringTeamsToImplementChangeEffectivelyAndExecutivesToSeeResultsImmediately
data.value: CI Tracker strives to bridge the gap between data and action, empowering teams to implement change effectively and executives to see results immediately.

data.name: ClosedProjectsCanBeRandomlySelectedForAuditing
data.value: Closed projects can be randomly selected for auditing

data.name: CollectReviewAndPrioritizeImprovementIdeasThroughAStructuredIntakeWorkflow
data.value: Collect, review, and prioritize improvement ideas through a structured intake workflow.

data.name: ConductProcessAuditsWithConfigurableChecklistsAndAttachSupportingEvidence
data.value: Conduct process audits with configurable checklists and attach supporting evidence. All documents are securely stored in the customer’s SharePoint tenant to maintain full data ownership.

data.name: CreatedByActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Created By: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CummulativeMonthlySavingsActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Cummulative Monthly Savings: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CummulativeROIActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Cummulative ROI: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CummulativeStatusActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Cummulative Status: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: CurrencyMustBeInTheISO4217Format
data.value: Currency must be in the ISO 4217 format (e.g USD, GBP, NGN etc..)

data.name: DateCreatedActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Date Created: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: DateMustBeInYYYYMMDDFormat
data.value: Date must be in yyyy-MM-dd format

data.name: DepartmentActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Department: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: DescriptionActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Description: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: DriveOperationalExcellenceByStandardizingProcessesReducingWasteAndImprovingEfficiency
data.value: Drive operational excellence by standardizing processes, reducing waste, and improving efficiency across your organization. Monitor performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement improvements that deliver measurable results every day.

data.name: EachFileMustBeLessThan20MB
data.value: Each file must be less than 20MB!!!

data.name: EmailSentSuccessfullyKindlyVerifyYourEmail
data.value: Email sent successfully. Kindly verify your email

data.name: EndDateActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: End date: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: EndDateMustBeLaterThanStartDate
data.value: End Date must be later than Start Date.

data.name: ExecutiveSponsorEmailAddressMustBeAValidEmailAddress
data.value: Executive Sponsor Email Address must be a valid email address

data.name: FacilitatorActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Facilitator: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: FacilitatorEmailAddressMustBeAValidEmailAddress
data.value: Facilitator Email Address must be a valid email address

data.name: FacilityActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Facility: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: FinalReportSupportedFormat
data.value: Final Report (Supported Format: PPT, Excel, PDF, Word)

data.name: FinancialReportSupportedFormat
data.value: Financial Report (Supported Format: PPT, Excel, PDF, Word)

data.name: IdActivateToSortColumnDescending
data.value: Id: activate to sort column descending

data.name: InitiativeActivateToSortColumnDescending
data.value: Initiative: activate to sort column descending

data.name: InvalidStatusValue
data.value: Invalid status value. Allowed values are: PROPOSED, INITIATED, COMPLETED, CLOSED, CANCELLED

data.name: IsCarryOverProjectMustBeOneOfYesOrNo
data.value: IsCarryOverProject must be one of: Yes or No

data.name: KindlyCreateAStrategicInitiativeProjectFirst
data.value: Kindly Create a Strategic Initiative Project first

data.name: KindlyProvideAValidEmailAddress
data.value: Kindly provide a valid email address

data.name: KindlySelectAMonthAndYear
data.value: Kindly select a Month and Year.

data.name: KindlySelectAStrategicInitiativeProject
data.value: Kindly select a Strategic Initiative Project

data.name: KindlySelectAValidTeamMember
data.value: Kindly select a valid team member

data.name: LicencesAvailableKindlyUpgradeYourSubscriptionPlanForMoreUserLicenses
data.value: licences available. Kindly upgrade your subscription plan for more user licenses

data.name: LocationActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Location: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: MakeStrategyClearTrackableAndActionable
data.value: Make strategy clear, trackable, and actionable, so every initiative drives measurable results. Align organizational goals with execution to maximize impact, prioritize high-value projects, and accelerate business growth.

data.name: MakingContinuousImprovementVisibleMeasurableAndScalable
data.value: Making continuous improvement visible, measurable, and scalable allows organizations to align teams, track real impact, replicate successes across operations, and drive sustainable business results.

data.name: ManageClassicSmallAndMediumSizedProjects
data.value: Manage classic small and medium-sized projects using the 5-stage lifecycle framework.

data.name: ManageInitiativesTrackAuditsRealiseBenefits
data.value: Manage initiatives — track audits — realise benefits

data.name: MethodologyActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Methodology: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: MonthYearActivateToSortColumnDescending
data.value: Month & Year: activate to sort column descending

data.name: NameActivateToSortColumnDescending
data.value: Name: activate to sort column descending

data.name: NotePaymentIntegrationRequiresServerSideEndpoints
data.value: Note: Payment integration requires server-side endpoints to create payment sessions (Stripe/Square). This demo will call placeholder endpoints.

data.name: NoteToAttachTheFinancialReport
data.value: Note: To attach the financial report, ensure to enter in hard savings, upload final report under the attachment status and move project to completed status under the project detail tab.

data.name: NoteYouCanDownloadTheSampleTemplates
data.value: Note: You can download the sample templates for each from the Download Icon

data.name: NoteYouWillBeDirectedToMakePayment
data.value: Note: You will be directed to make payment.

data.name: OopsThePageYouAreLookingForDoesntExist
data.value: Oops.The Page you are looking for doesn't exit..

data.name: PhaseContainsAnInvalidValueForTheSelectedMethodology
data.value: Phase contains an invalid value for the selected Methodology.

data.name: PhaseActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Phase: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: PlanPrioritiseAndMonitorImprovementIdeas
data.value: Plan, prioritise and monitor improvement ideas from submission to completion. Set milestones, assign owners, manage risks and track progress using structured workflows.

data.name: PriorityMustBeOneOfHighMediumOrLow
data.value: Priority must be one of: High, Medium or Low

data.name: PriorityActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Priority: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: ProblemStatementActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Problem Statement: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: ProjectMustHaveAtLeastOneFacilitator
data.value: Project must have at least one Facilitator.

data.name: RealTimeInsightsAcrossAllFacilitiesAndDepartmentsGlobally
data.value: Real-time insights across all facilities and departments globally.

data.name: RelevantInformationToProvideRecentActivityAndUpdatesToTheInitiative
data.value: Relevant information to provide recent activity and updates to the initiative

data.name: SavingsClassificationActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Savings Classification: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: SavingsClassificationMustBeOneOf
data.value: SavingsClassification must be one of: Cost Out, Cost Savings, Revenue or Cost Avoidance

data.name: SavingsSpanningOverMoreThanAYear
data.value: Savings spanning over more than a year

data.name: SavingsThatWillNotBeRecurringOvertime
data.value: Savings that will not be recurring overtime

data.name: SavingsActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Savings: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: SearchTrackAndFindProjectsInsightsAndLessonsInstantly
data.value: Search, track, and find projects, insights, and lessons instantly.

data.name: SelectADateAfterTheProjectStartDate
data.value: Select a date after the project start date

data.name: SelectAndModifyTheStatusAsTheInitiativeProjectProgress
data.value: Select and modify the status as the initiative/project progress

data.name: SelectFunctionalGroupsThatOwnsTheProjectBeingImproved
data.value: Select functional groups that owns the project being improved

data.name: SelectMoreYearsToSaveMore
data.value: Select more years to save more (2 years = 10% off; 3 years = 15% off).

data.name: SelectRolesForTeamMembers
data.value: Select roles for team members, ensure to have a minimum of one facilitator/owner

data.name: SelectTheMostAppropriateApproachForExecutingTheInitiativeProject
data.value: Select the most appropriate approach for executing the initiative/project.

data.name: SelectTheMostAppropriateObjectivesBasedOnYourBusinessFocus
data.value: Select the most appropriate objectives based on your business focus

data.name: SponsorActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Sponsor: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: SponsorEmailAddressMustBeAValidEmailAddress
data.value: Sponsor Email Address must be a valid email address

data.name: StartDateMustBeEarlierThanEndDate
data.value: Start Date must be earlier than End Date.

data.name: StatusPercentageCompletionActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Status/Percentage Completion: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: StatusActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Status: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: TargetSavingsActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Target Savings: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: TeamActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Team: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: TheCITrackerWebAppComesWithReadyToUseFeatures
data.value: The CITracker web app comes with ready-to-use features that are completely easy-to-use for any user, even for a beginner.

data.name: TheNameOfTheValueStreamThisInitiativeIsTiedTo
data.value: The name of the value stream this initiative is tied to

data.name: ThisHelpsWithTyingTheInitiativeProjectToAnyLeanSixSigmaCertificationEffort
data.value: This helps with tying the initiative/project to any Lean 6 sigma certification effort

data.name: ThisIncludesNonFinancialSavings
data.value: This includes non-financial savings (e.g. time, space, quality, safety)

data.name: TitleActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Title: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: ToggleForAnyTeamMemberYouWouldLikeToReceiveAnEmailNotification
data.value: Toggle for any team member you would like to receive an email notification whenever any update is made

data.name: TotalExpectedRevenueActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Total Expected Revenue: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: TrackPractitionerProgressAndProjectMilestones
data.value: Track practitioner progress and project milestones for Lean Six Sigma certifications.

data.name: UnitOfMeasurement
data.value: Unit of measurement (e.g. minutes, m², dpu)

data.name: WeAreHereToHelpYou
data.value: We are here to help you

data.name: WhatPeopleAreSayingAboutCITracker
data.value: What People Are Saying About CITracker.

data.name: YouHaveTwoProjectsToFinishYouHadCompleted
data.value: You have two projects to finish, you had completed

data.name: YouHaveUsedUpYourAvailableLicensesKindlyUpgradeYourSubscriptionPlan
data.value: You have used up your available licenses, Kindly upgrade your subscription plan

data.name: YouHaveUsedUpYourAvailableUserLicensesKindlyUpgradeYourSubscriptionPlan
data.value: You have used up your available user licenses, Kindly upgrade your subscription plan

data.name: YouMayHaveMistypedTheAddressOrThePageMayHaveMoved
data.value: You may have mistyped the address or the page may have moved. Try searching below.

data.name: YouNeedToIdentifyIfThisIsACarryOverProject
data.value: You need to Identify if this is a Carry Over Project

data.name: YourPaymentRequestHasBeenSubmittedSuccessfully
data.value: Your Payment Request has been submitted Successfully, you will receive an email once your account is activated.

data.name: YourPaymentRequestSubmissionFailed
data.value: Your Payment Request submission failed, kindly check with your bank and retry.

data.name: Suitable for Small Businesses or closed group trials
data.value: Suitable for Small Businesses or closed group trials

data.name: Great for large businesses with multiple teams tracking several projects in parallel.
data.value: Great for large businesses with multiple teams tracking several projects in parallel.

data.name: Ideal for sizeable projects and businesses with expanding teams.
data.value: Ideal for sizeable projects and businesses with expanding teams.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToCancelYourSubscription
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?

data.name: ExcelMustContainHeadersAndAtLeastOneDataRow
data.value: Excel must contain headers and at least one data row

data.name: StartDateActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Start date: activate to sort column ascending

data.name: OwnerActivateToSortColumnAscending
data.value: Owner: activate to sort column ascending
